# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep; lowest-scored resident is evicted.
    age        = now - insert_time
    frequency  = total access count while resident
    recency    = now - last_access_time
    size       = item size (1 in the uniform-cost experiments)
    cache_size = capacity (constant within a run)
    now        = current logical timestamp
    """
    # Adjusted heuristic: Increased weight on recency (0.6) to better handle
    # temporal locality bursts and churn scenarios where items die quickly.
    # Reduced frequency weight (0.4) to prevent stagnation on frequently accessed
    # but stale items, allowing recent activity to drive eviction decisions more strongly.
    return 0.4 * frequency + 0.6 * recency
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
